top_signals.title: How to Play the World Cup Betting Boom
top_signals.summary:
The World Cup is shaping up to be one of the biggest betting events of the year. David Katz, analyst at Jefferies, joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" from the Jefferies Consumer Conference in Nantucket to discuss the betting boom.

Correction: This video has been edited to update a graphic with correct analyst disclosures. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 16 2026
top_signals.summary: Bulkers: Bulker secondhand activity this week was dominated by Chinese buyers. The concentration of Chinese buying interest across multiple size segments points to sustained regional demand. Bulker values remained stable this week. top_signals.title: Magnitude 5.5 quake jolts Tokyo area
top_signals.summary: The quake, measuring a lower 5 on Japan's seismic intensity scale, struck southern Ibaraki Prefecture at 7:46 p.m. There was no threat of a tsunami.
